description: Marriage contract (ketubba) stating that the 200 zuz were "established by the holy college" and the dinars bear the sign "of the temporal ruler." Date, location and witnesses are not preserved, but the marriage probably took place outside of Egypt, as a gift of an ‘Egyptian sheet’ is mentioned. (Friedman, Jewish Marriage, vol. 2, 301-9) EMS
description_he: כתובה המציינת ש-200 הזוז 'נקבעו בקולגיום הקדוש' והדינרים נושאים 'סמל השליט החילוני'. המקום, התאריך והעדים לא נשמרו; כנראה מחוץ למצרים.
